pkulaw-law-search.title: 北大法宝-检索法律法规（语义）
pkulaw-law-search.description: Use semantic search for laws and regulations when the local corpus is insufficient or a broader compliance search is needed.

pkulaw-law-keyword.title: 北大法宝-检索法律法规（关键词）
pkulaw-law-keyword.description: Use keyword search for targeted law and regulation lookup by title or text fragments.

pkulaw-case-semantic-search.title: 北大法宝-检索司法案例（语义）
pkulaw-case-semantic-search.description: Use semantic case search for enforcement examples, disputes, and fact-pattern analogies.

pkulaw-law-item-keyword.title: 北大法宝-精准查找法条（关键词）
pkulaw-law-item-keyword.description: Use exact article lookup when the report needs a specific law name and article number.

pkulaw-citation-validator.title: 北大法宝-修正生成幻觉（法条）
pkulaw-citation-validator.description: Use citation validation before finalizing concrete article references in a compliance report.
